name: Chicken Morocco
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 ounce can stewed tomatoes, no salt added
1/2 cup prune juice, or orange juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 1- 1/2 cups water to a boil in a saucepan.
2. Add bulghur and cook over low heat for 20 minutes, covered.
3. In a skillet, brown chicken in oil over medium-high heat. Drain excess fat.
4. Stir in tomatoes, prune juice (or orange juice), prunes, and allspice.
5. Cover and cook until the sauce thickens and the chicken is done, about 10 minutes. Turn the chicken occasionally to ensure even cooking.
6. Serve the chicken over the cooked bulghur.
